naming.rule: Directories use short repo-local names; SKILL.md frontmatter names use canonical beo-* names.
naming.folder_rename_policy: Do not rename folders without a dedicated migration bead.

skills.name: beo-plan
skills.role: Plan, decompose, and scope one Beads issue before validation.

skills.name: beo-validate
skills.role: Grant or refuse PASS_EXECUTE for one planned atomic ticket.

skills.name: beo-execute
skills.role: Mutate only approved scope and record execution evidence.

skills.name: beo-review
skills.role: Audit execution, accept, close, or route repair.

skills.name: beo-debug
skills.role: Diagnose one blocker for execute or review without product mutation.

skills.name: beo-learn
skills.role: Persist reusable post-review or post-debug lessons as advisory memory.

skills.name: beo-author
skills.role: Maintain BEO doctrine, registries, templates, scripts, and skill contracts.

skills.name: beo-setup
skills.role: Check or configure BEO tooling and authorized memory integrations.

skills.name: beo-reference
skills.role: Read-only lookup of BEO doctrine, registries, templates, and command contracts.
